steps.title: Compare the color mechanisms
steps.content: Text 1 says flamingos become pinker because they eat brine shrimp. Text 2 adds that flamingos also apply pigment from a gland while grooming, making their feathers appear pinker.

steps.title: Challenge the single cause
steps.content: A focuses on tail feathers, B minimizes visible color change, and D invents seasonal shrimp consumption. Text 2 would respond that shrimp eaten is not the only influence on flamingo coloring. The answer is C.
